reasoning: Query asks for Tohoku cherry blossom spots; expected entities include 弘前公園, 三春滝桜, 北上展勝地, 角館. Tool was called for Akita only, returning generic Akita sightseeing (stone circles, ravines, museum, lake, castle). Zero of the five expected sakura-specific entities appear. Schema is solid with kinds, heritage_designations_labels, prominence_score. Fundamental tool mismatch: single-prefecture sakura query needs keyword/category filtering.

improvement_hint: Add category or keyword arg to get_spots so agent can filter by theme (sakura/cherry blossom); or expose a get_seasonal_attractions tool that joins municipality data with seasonal tags.

reasoning: Query asks for major sake breweries (八海山, 久保田, 越乃寒梅). get_local_specialty returns MAFF GI food items (edamame, carrots, lotus root) — no sake or breweries at all. The tool covers GI-designated agricultural products and METI crafts but has no coverage of sake breweries. All expected entities missing. Data within the response is accurate for what it returns, schema is clean, but category mismatch is severe.

improvement_hint: Add a sake/brewery data source or expose a 'beverage' category in get_local_specialty; alternatively index GI sake designations (越後杜氏 etc.) and Wikidata brewery entities under a drinks category.

reasoning: Query: ski resorts with onsen in Hakuba. Expected: 白馬八方尾根/Happo-One, Goryu, 白馬大池. 白馬大池 appears (lake, not ski resort). No ski resort entities. improvement_hint: Add kinds='ski_resort' to Wikidata indexing; filter or demote municipal admin/bureaucratic pages (quality_score<0.5) from top of ranked results; consider exposing municipality filter with topic arg.

reasoning: Query: best autumn foliage spots in Kansai. Expected: 嵐山, 東福寺, 永観堂. Missing 東福寺 and 永観堂 specifically but broad Kyoto coverage is strong. Excellent schema and traceability.
improvement_hint: Add foliage/seasonal keyword filtering so autumn-specific spots (東福寺, 永観堂) surface first; consider tagging spots with seasonal_highlights metadata.

reasoning: Query: famous cherry blossom spots in Kansai (Arabic). Expected: 吉野山, 醍醐寺, 嵐山, 哲学の道. Tool called for Nara only. reasoning: Query: islands in Okinawa with stargazing. No specific expected entities. Response returns prominent Okinawa landmarks: 玉陵 (National Treasure, UNESCO), 首里城 (prominent), 中城城, 斎場御嶽 (UNESCO sacred site), 今帰仁城. All real entities with heritage_designations_labels, prominence_score, full coordinates. None are specifically dark-sky/stargazing spots but these are plausible Okinawa highlights. Schema excellent. reasoning: Query: rural onsen accommodation in Hokkaido (Thai). No specific expected entities. Response returns hotels: urban Sapporo chains (ANA Holiday Inn, ANA Crowne Plaza Sapporo) dominate. reasoning: Query: islands in Seto Inland Sea worth visiting. Tool: Kagawa spots. reasoning: Query: indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Tool returns METI craft items for Tokushima: 阿波正藍しじら織 (Awa indigo shijira weave), 大谷焼 (pottery), 阿波和紙 (indigo-dyed washi paper). reasoning: Query: off-the-beaten-path samurai districts outside Kyoto. Tool: search_area(武家屋敷). 81 matches returned. reasoning: Query: traditional crafts of San'in region (Chinese). Tool: Shimane craft specialties. Returns 4 METI items: 石見焼 (ceramics), 石州和紙 (washi), 雲州そろばん (abacus), 出雲石燈ろう (stone lanterns). reasoning: Query: traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Returns 2 items: 博多織 (Hakata weave, Oita is one of 3 prefectures) and 別府竹細工 (Beppu Bamboo Crafts — exactly what the query targets). 別府竹細工 is ranked second but is directly relevant. 博多織 is Oita-applicable but primarily Fukuoka. Both have full English descriptions, high-confidence translations, METI authority, source URLs. Small set but accurate. 別府竹細工 description is excellent.
